name: filepath
north_star: Shareable URL (password optional) opens a session with N tabs. Each tab is exactly one iframe-backed live terminal. Terminal is interactive over WebSocket: Browser → Worker → Sandbox (ttyd) → Browser. Works in local dev + prod.
goal: Build the north star: session model → terminal plumbing → UI → end-to-end verification.

stories.title: Session + tabs data model (minimal, password optional)
stories.description: Define the stable public surface: create session, optional password, list tabs, set active tab. Keep it dead simple; no agents, dumps, or advanced features yet.
stories.verification: bun run test && bun run typecheck

stories.title: Per-tab terminal plumbing (start + WS proxy)
stories.description: Each tab maps to one Sandbox container (id = `${sessionId}:${tabId}`) running `ttyd` on port 7681. Provide start + ws endpoints. Keep upgrade path clean (no async middleware before 101).
acceptance_criteria: POST `/terminal/:sessionId/:tabId/start` starts ttyd and waits for port 7681
GET `/terminal/:sessionId/:tabId/ws` returns 101 and forwards bytes both directions
After connecting to ttyd WS, send `{columns,rows}` JSON as TEXT to trigger prompt
stories.verification: bun run test && bun run typecheck

stories.title: Session page UI (tabs + iframe-per-tab)
stories.description: Serve a session page that renders a tab bar + one iframe. Switching tabs swaps the iframe src. The iframe page is a minimal xterm client for that tab.
acceptance_criteria: GET `/session/:sessionId` returns HTML with tab bar + iframe region
Tab page connects to `/terminal/:sessionId/:tabId/ws` and is interactive
stories.verification: bun run test && bun run typecheck

stories.title: North Star: shareable multi-terminal session (tabs + iframe-per-tab) works in dev + prod
stories.description: Open `/session/:sessionId` (password optional) → see N tabs → each tab renders exactly one iframe-backed live terminal. Terminal is interactive via WebSocket: Browser → Worker → Sandbox(ttyd) → Browser. No auth walls; link is shareable.
acceptance_criteria: Shareable URL `/session/:sessionId` loads without login; optional password gate supported
Page shows N tabs; switching tabs swaps iframe src
Each iframe shows a live terminal; typing runs commands; output streams back
ttyd handshake: after WS connect, send `{columns,rows}` JSON as TEXT and prompt appears
Local dev works (2-process): `bun run dev:container` + `bun run dev`
Prod works after deploy with the same UX
`bun run test` and `bun run typecheck` are green
stories.verification: bun run test && bun run typecheck

rules.loop: Pick one pending story → write tests → implement → verify → commit → update prd.json + progress.txt
rules.tests_required: bun run test && bun run typecheck
rules.terminal_protocol: ttyd requires {columns,rows} JSON as TEXT after WS connect
rules.ws_upgrade: Do not do async auth/middleware before returning 101
